# datahub_data_products (Data Source)

**DataHub ✅ | DataHub Cloud ✅**

Returns the URNs of all DataHub data products visible to the authenticated principal.

Backed by the `searchAcrossEntities` GraphQL query (entity type `DATA_PRODUCT`). Use the returned `urns` list as the `for_each` value in `import {}` blocks to bulk-import existing data products into Terraform state.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `urns` (List of String) List of DataHub URNs for all data products (e.g. `["urn:li:dataProduct:orders-v2"]`).
